entities.boy: a small boy with a scraped knee
entities.teacher: a female teacher in a cardigan

scenes.title: The School Yard
scenes.background_prompt: An elementary school yard with a blacktop area, painted lines for games, a chain-link fence, a climbing frame in the background, and a few trees. Bright afternoon. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: An elementary school yard on a bright afternoon. A small boy with short brown hair and a blue t-shirt sits on the blacktop ground, his legs stretched out in front of him. His left knee has a visible red scrape and he clutches it with one hand, his face scrunched up and his mouth open as if about to cry. A red rubber ball lies on the ground a few feet away from him. A female teacher in a gray cardigan over a white blouse and black trousers walks briskly toward the boy from the right, her expression concerned, one hand reaching out. In the background, a group of children are small figures playing near a climbing frame, blurred and indistinct. A chain-link fence runs along the edge of the yard, and a few leafy trees provide shade on the far side.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy on the blacktop ground (center), sitting with legs stretched out, left knee scraped and red, clutching it with one hand, face scrunched as if about to cry. Place teacher walking briskly toward the boy from the right, expression concerned, one hand reaching out. Place ball on the ground a few feet from the boy.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground on the left, a boy with short brown hair sits on a dark grey asphalt surface, crying with his mouth open and eyes squinted. He wears a light blue t-shirt under blue denim overalls, white socks, and brown shoes. His left knee is scraped and red. To his left is a partial blue and orange circular line painted on the ground. In front of him is a hopscotch grid with yellow, blue, and white squares containing numbers. To the right of the hopscotch grid sits a solid red ball on the asphalt near the edge of a grassy area. Approaching from the right is a teacher with brown hair tied in a bun and a concerned facial expression. She wears a green cardigan over a light blue collared shirt, a brown knee-length skirt, dark blue tights, and brown shoes. She is mid-stride, walking toward the boy with her hands slightly raised. The ground on the right is covered in green grass dotted with small white, pink, and yellow flowers. Behind the boy and the teacher, a chain-link fence with a metal top rail spans the width of the scene. Several small green bushes grow along the base of the fence. Three large trees with thick brown trunks and rounded green canopies are positioned across the midground: one on the far left, one behind the red ball, and one on the far right. Behind the teacher and to the right of the center tree is a playground structure featuring a blue and yellow ladder and a green slide with yellow railings. In the background, behind the fence, is a long, single-story brick building with several rectangular windows. The sky above is a light blue, filled with several large, fluffy white clouds, indicating a clear, sunny day.

CH: a young boy in blue overalls
a concerned teacher with a bun
S: a long brick building in background
IE: the boy fell on the asphalt
the boy scraped his left knee
IR: the teacher looks worried and concerned
P: the teacher wants to help him
the boy wants his knee to stop hurting
A: the boy is sitting and crying
the teacher is walking toward the boy
CO: a red scrape on the boy's knee
the red ball stopped near the grass

ENP: a green cardigan over a blue shirt
